$comment: Slice 4 (AC-KOREAN-UI / decision b): the DisclosureBanner was Korean-ized; this single source of truth was updated in lock-step so the T1 banner-audit asserts the Korean phrasing. The legal/security MEANING of each of the four required phrases is unchanged — only the language. Each matcher is a substring that appears verbatim in DisclosureBanner.svelte (phrase rows and/or the why-body).

phrases.description: openai-oauth is community-maintained and not affiliated with OpenAI.
Using ChatGPT credentials carries Terms of Service risk.
auth.json is password-equivalent; do not share or host.
Personal use on this single machine only.
